brand.name: Franciele Sofiati Biomédica
brand.descriptor: Franciele Sofiati Biomédica · Consultation-led aesthetic care in Londrina, Paraná.
brand.voiceLine: Listen carefully. Explain honestly. Treat only when appropriate.

reassurance: Tell Franciele what you have noticed; you do not need to choose a treatment first.
A message can begin the conversation, but individual recommendations are confirmed in consultation.
Treatment response, recovery and the number of sessions vary.
No result is guaranteed and no photograph predicts another person’s response.
Urgent or rapidly worsening symptoms require appropriate medical assessment.

quotations: A highly capable and attentive professional.
The best place to care for my skin.

footer.introduction: Franciele Sofiati Biomédica provides consultation-led aesthetic care in Londrina for skin, laser, facial, scalp, vascular and body concerns. Recommendations reflect assessment, suitability and the person’s priorities.
footer.supportLine: Begin with what you would like to understand. Franciele will explain whether treatment, preparation, referral or time may be appropriate.
